nodes.title: Positive Prompt
widgets_values:
mila, a 23-year-old French woman taking a candid mirror selfie. She features a sharp black chin-length bob with a blunt fringe framing her face, hazel almond-shaped eyes, and fair sun-kissed skin with light freckles across her nose and cheeks. Her expression is relaxed as she gazes directly at the mirror reflection. Her left hand holds a modern smartphone up near her face, her fingers accented by bright red nail polish, while her right hand rests casually on her hip. She is wearing a tight white ribbed crop top with small center buttons and a branded elastic underband. Over it, a thick grey zip-up hoodie is worn open, slipping softly off her right shoulder to reveal a delicate gold pendant necklace resting on her chest. She pairs this with matching grey sweatpants featuring a white drawstring tied at the front.

The fitted crop top stretches taut across her large heavy breasts, leaving her midriff completely bare to display a very flat stomach. The soft grey sweatpants cling snugly to her wide hips, and the placement of her right hand pushes the thick fabric back slightly, emphasizing an ultra-narrow cinched waist and a pronounced hourglass silhouette. 

The mirror reflection captures the tight space of a small bathroom. Directly behind her is a classic white paneled door with a decorative silver handle. Warm ambient overhead lighting illuminates the room, casting soft, natural shadows across her collarbones, bare midriff, and the deep folds of her heavy cotton hoodie. The image possesses a raw, unpolished snapshot aesthetic with highly realistic skin texture, visible pores, natural fabric weave, coherent anatomy, and naturally positioned hands gripping the phone.

Camera + Technical Metadata: recent iPhone-style capture, rear-camera mirror selfie, 24mm wide-angle equivalent, natural smartphone processing, realistic ambient exposure, natural smartphone depth of field, readable background detail, crisp authentic phone-photo sharpness.
